changelog.message: add a new Canvas floating mode, param panel then becomes full height
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Changed the zoom for centering ops (c) and clicking findresult to be more zoomed out
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Editor does not force timeline to play after loading the ui
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Load op-dependency only once per patch, preventing lot's of requests for parent-op
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Mesh ops show an X in the op title when drawing is deactivated
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Optimized loading time for patches with many materials/shadermods and effects, only compile shaders when they are needed
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Rework import and backup-restore workflow, option to not restore/import op-code
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Store canvas mode in user preferences, restore when opening the editor
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: selected op connected cables now have a brighter outline and are move visible when zoomed out
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: op suggestions based on objtype, e.g. audio object outputs
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: no longer taking a screenshot when changing from automatic to manual screenshots in patch settings
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Gradient editor: Added simple presets
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Gradient editor: Added button to reverse all keys in current gradient
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Added user preference to switch the text editor, added basic support for codemirror and a simple textarea editor
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Speed up subpatch op saving when reloading multiple instances of op
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Optimize shader compilation time, by only checking valid link status when shader is actually used
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Fix "take screenshot now" button, was not working in some cases
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Export: Remove reference to non-existant sourcemaps from non-minified exports
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Vizualisation ops are also suggested when clicking on a cable
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Notify UI of file-upload via cables-cli and refresh file ports
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Filemanager: Files are greyed out if not used in current patch
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Ignore new annoying chrome pointerlock exceptions
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: File manager removes current selection filter when switching to another op
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Mute audio will be stored in user preferences now. Added new commands for mute/unmute audio. Muted audio icon is highlighted in the canvas UI bar
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Allow upload of binary as an op-dependency (i.e. for WASM)
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix project-settings tabs sometimes not clickable
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: fixed size of patchbg canvas and cmd+enter now cycles between normal->patchgg->maximized
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: popout canvas did not work correctly when adding elements to the patch, because of wrong container element
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Gradient editor draggable points would not register a "pointer up" event
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Op search improve colors for loadable op collections (teams/extensions)
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Fix bug in updating ui when disconnecting multiplayer client
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Switched code/text/string editors: Removed ACE editor and switched to CodeMirror 6
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Allow team-users to see file-infos for uploaded assets
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix bug with extendet title not showing when falsish value
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Tooltips are no longer positioned outside of the browser window/ parameter panel tooltips for input ports
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Search toggle: ":animated" search only over ops that have animated ports
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Ops can now be tagged, those tags can be queried by ops for meta patch functionality
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Math ops now show variablenames when directly set to port
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Left Tabpanel/Editor can now be toggled using cmd/ctrl+b hotkey
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Port suggestions in opselect dialog now shows "variable in port" to directly get variable values into a port without creating a var get op
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Overlay transforms can now display text
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Drawcall profiler: new view to see what drawcalls to webgl are currently executed
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Text editor appearance will be greyed out when not currently focussed
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Fix name and link to team for extensions in opselect
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Restoring a backup will restore ui attributes of patch (e.g. bookmarks)
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Optimize performance spikes when selecting huge amounts of ops
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Prevent creating ops with illegal names
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Make op dependencies editable in editor
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Filemanager: highlight latest uploaded file
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Unified handling of attachments and libraries in mangage op
changelog.author: stephan
